topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into State Management. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Frontend Developer roles.
whyItMatters: State Management is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing State Management in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in State Management
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating State Management.
Fix the bug in the given State Management snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of State Management?
How does State Management handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate State Management into a microservice
Scale State Management for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about State Management
